rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.description: A dimly lit hall. Torches flicker along the stone walls.

rooms.name: Goblin Den
rooms.description: You hear chittering from the shadows. Goblins lurk here.

rooms.name: Sage's Chamber
rooms.description: A quiet room filled with books and mystical artifacts.

rooms.name: Ancient Forge
rooms.description: Glowing runes cover the walls. An enchanted anvil pulses with energy.

rooms.name: Treasure Vault
rooms.description: Gleaming crystals and ancient coins litter the floor.

rooms.name: Skeleton Crypt
rooms.description: Bones crunch underfoot. The dead do not rest here.

rooms.name: Rest Alcove
rooms.description: A small alcove with a healing spring. You feel your wounds mending.

rooms.name: Merchant's Nook
rooms.description: A makeshift shop set up in the dungeon corridor.

rooms.name: Dark Mage's Lair
rooms.description: Purple energy crackles through the air. A powerful mage awaits.

rooms.name: Guardian's Chamber
rooms.description: A massive door blocks the way forward. The Guardian stands before it.
